notes: Evidence supplied during Stage 4 review because the close-case Salesforce comment was not present in the extracted page OCR/artifact inputs.

kpi_tracking.basis: Use CBRE/work-order entry time as the source-supported tracking start and the Salesforce close comment stating the site is running as the tracking end.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: CBRE SERVICEInsight work order entered 2/20/2026 7:19 AM for the robotic system not responding.
Salesforce close comment at 2:58 PM on 2026-02-20 states that the site is running and the case will be closed.

notes: The close timestamp is user-provided review evidence from a Salesforce comment screenshot.
The tracking start is the current best extracted source-supported start time, not necessarily the first physical failure moment.
